overall.description: A cinematic first-person walkthrough of a futuristic urban memorial in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning with an NCPD officer on a city sidewalk and transitioning through a plaza with tall black stone monoliths, autumn foliage, and scattered pedestrians including monks in traditional robes.

events.description: camera circles around the officer to reveal the seated person on the curb
moving away from the street toward the plaza area with benches

agents.ego_description: circling around the NCPD officer to examine him and the seated person before moving toward the plaza

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer standing still holding a glowing tablet device
person sitting on the curb with head bowed down

entered.detail: Police officer in black tactical uniform with NCPD cap and sunglasses
Large multicolored patio umbrella over outdoor seating area
Modern white benches and tables arranged under the umbrella
Tall futuristic buildings and industrial towers in the background haze

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a sunny urban sidewalk where an NCPD officer stands holding a tablet. The camera circles around him, revealing a seated person on the curb, then moves past outdoor seating toward a futuristic plaza with tall black monoliths visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with outdoor seating transitioning to memorial garden

events.description: passing the benches and entering the area with tall grass and monoliths

agents.ego_description: walking past the outdoor seating area toward the black stone monoliths and landscaped garden

notable_agents.action: man in plaid shirt sitting on bench looking at his phone

entered.detail: Tall rectangular black stone pillars arranged in geometric rows
Trees with bright golden-yellow autumn foliage
Brown arid mountains visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the street into a sunlit plaza with modern benches under a colorful umbrella. The camera approaches a memorial garden featuring tall black stone monoliths and golden autumn trees, with mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: memorial garden with reflecting pools and monoliths

events.description: entering the maze-like area between the tall black monoliths
beginning to ascend the wide stone stairs between the monoliths

agents.ego_description: walking through the memorial passages and ascending the wide stone stairs alongside other visitors

notable_agents.action: group of four people walking up the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: Narrow water channel running between the rows of monoliths
Wide gray stone steps leading upward between the monoliths

segments.scene_description: Entering the memorial's maze-like interior between towering black monoliths with a reflecting pool on the right. The camera follows a group of people ascending wide stone stairs, passing golden trees and tall grasses as the architecture creates partial shade.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep stairway between tall monolith walls

events.description: encountering three monks in orange robes walking up the stairs

agents.ego_description: continuing up the steep stairs alongside monks in traditional robes, passing between tall concrete walls

notable_agents.action: three monks in orange and red robes walking up the stairs in a group

entered.detail: Smooth gray walls with geometric patterns rising high on both sides of the stairs

segments.scene_description: Ascending a steep stairway flanked by tall concrete walls with geometric patterns. Three monks in orange robes walk ahead on the left, while the camera continues upward between the massive architectural structures toward the top of the memorial.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passages between monoliths with meditation spaces

events.description: discovering people meditating on platforms between the monoliths
turning a corner between monoliths into a narrower passage

agents.ego_description: navigating the narrow passages between monoliths and observing people meditating on the platforms

notable_agents.action: person sitting cross-legged in meditation posture on a raised platform

entered.detail: Raised concrete platform where people are seated in meditation

segments.scene_description: Moving through narrow passages between the massive black monoliths where the sky is mostly blocked. People are seen meditating on raised platforms. The camera explores the maze-like interior, turning corners and revealing more of the geometric architecture with mountain views opening up ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright urban sidewalk into the depths of a towering, geometric memorial complex. It begins by circling an NCPD officer on a sunny street, moving past outdoor seating and a seated pedestrian before gliding toward a sunlit plaza filled with modern benches and colorful umbrellas. As the camera enters the memorial garden, the open city space shifts into a maze of tall black stone monoliths and golden autumn trees set against a backdrop of distant mountains. The scene then ascends wide stone stairs and steep concrete walkways flanked by geometric patterns, following monks in orange robes upward into areas of partial shade. Finally, the camera navigates narrow passages between the massive monoliths where the sky is nearly blocked, passing meditating figures on raised platforms before turning corners to reveal further architectural vistas and mountain views.
